hero.headline: Your Brain Is The Business.
hero.lede: You built something from nothing using one tool: your mind. Caffeine, willpower, and grinding through got you here. They won't get you where you're going. Over 100,000 people have found a better way to support cognitive performance – without dependency, without crashes.

marquee: The ones running on 4 hours sleep
Builders who think while they drive
People whose brain is the business

founder.caption: JustFloow · Founder
founder.headline: I built Genius Mind because willpower wasn't cutting it anymore.
founder.intro: Years ago I was running a business pretty much alone. The mornings were sharp. The afternoons fell apart. And I was the one everyone was looking to.
body: I told myself it was just the load. That this is what scaling felt like. That if I optimised one more system, one more morning routine, I'd find another gear.

I didn't. The underlying issue wasn't discipline. It was neurochemistry. My brain was running on a depleted substrate – and no amount of cold showers, journals, or 5am wake-ups was going to refill it.
tried_list: Spending half the day fighting the slump

why_built.headline: Here's Why I Built A 16-Ingredient Stack Instead Of Another Single-Ingredient Pill
bullets: Built for sustained output, not 90-min spikes
Vegan capsules · GMP certified · UK made
Compound effect – gets stronger over weeks

problem.eyebrow: The Performance Ceiling Nobody Talks About
problem.headline: You're Still The Sharpest Person In The Room. But the gap is closing.
body: You still make sharp calls. You still see things others miss. But the window where you're actually dangerous – where the thinking is clean and the decisions feel right – it's getting shorter.

9am to 11am. Maybe noon on a good day. After that you're still making decisions. Still answering, still building, still leading. But the processing is slower. The second-guessing is louder. And you know – even as it's happening – that you're not operating at the level you were three hours earlier.
You don't talk about this. Because you're the one everyone else looks to.

bullets.title: The 3pm drop
bullets.desc: decision quality falls off a cliff in the second half of the day

bullets.title: The sprint-crash cycle
bullets.desc: 3 days of elite output, then 2 days running on fumes

bullets.title: Caffeine tolerance creeping up
bullets.desc: needing more to get the same effect

bullets.title: The private fear
bullets.desc: wondering if this is just what happens as the business scales

callout: The sprint-crash cycle isn't a discipline problem. It isn't fixed by another morning routine or another productivity system. You've tried those. They help – briefly – and then the underlying issue reasserts itself.
The underlying issue is neurochemical. Your brain is running on a depleted substrate. And that's fixable.

timeline.headline: What To Expect – Week By Week
timeline.subtitle: Genius Mind isn't a day-one product. It's cognitive infrastructure – it builds. Here's what consistent daily use typically looks like.

items.title: Subtle Lift In Clarity
items.body: Most people notice a slight extension of the morning window – the period where thinking is cleanest. Guarana and B vitamins are active from day one.

items.title: The Afternoon Holds
items.body: The 3pm drop starts to flatten. You're making calls at 4pm with the same confidence you had at 10am. L-Tyrosine and Bacopa are now fully active.

items.title: The Sprint-Crash Cycle Breaks
items.body: Instead of 3 days of high output followed by 2 days running on fumes, you experience consistent baseline performance. Lion's Mane is supporting neural pathway maintenance.

items.title: Compound Effect
items.body: Memory, executive function, and decision stamina are all noticeably stronger. The cognitive ceiling you've been bumping against has moved. Most operators call this their breakthrough month.

items.title: New Cognitive Baseline
items.body: Your cognitive performance is no longer something you're managing – it's just the baseline. The single most foundational addition to your performance stack.

reviews.headline: Verified reviews from real customers
reviews.subtitle: Rated Excellent on Trustpilot. Here's what people are saying.

items.name: Mark D.
items.title: Fog has completely lifted
items.body: I run a small business on my own. I was putting everything off – the little things, the big things. Since taking Genius Mind the fog has lifted. I'm actually getting through decisions instead of circling them. Genuinely impressed.
items.reply: Thank you Mark! That shift from circling decisions to actually making them is exactly what Genius Mind was designed for. Really glad it's working for you.

items.name: Sarah K.
items.title: The 3pm slump is gone
items.body: The 3pm slump was killing my output. I'd make solid calls in the morning and then spend the afternoon second-guessing them. Two months in and I'm making the same quality decisions at 4pm. That's the metric that matters.
items.reply: Love hearing this Sarah. The afternoon cognitive drop-off is one of the main things we built Genius Mind to address. Two months is when most people really notice the compound effect kicking in.

items.name: James T.
items.title: First thing that actually worked
items.body: I've tried the usual stack – AG1, caffeine protocols, the whole thing. This is the first supplement that's actually moved the needle on how long I can sustain focus in a day. Six weeks in. Not stopping.
items.reply: Appreciate the comparison James. We specifically designed the stack to go beyond what single-ingredient supplements can do. Glad you're feeling the difference at 6 weeks!

items.name: Lucy W.
items.title: Noticed a difference within days
items.body: Was sceptical but gave it a go. Within the first week my energy was more consistent and I wasn't reaching for coffee by 2pm. Really good product, well made, and fast delivery too.
items.reply: Thanks Lucy! A lot of our customers say the same about reducing their caffeine dependency. The sustained energy from Guarana and B-vitamins is a game changer.

items.name: Tom R.
items.title: Best nootropic I've tried
items.body: I've tried a lot of nootropics over the years. This is the first one where I actually feel a sustained difference rather than a short spike. The ingredient quality is clearly a step above.
items.reply: That means a lot Tom. We use concentrated extracts (50:1 Ginkgo, 11:1 Bacopa, 20:1 Ginseng) specifically because they deliver sustained results, not short spikes.

items.name: Emma H.
items.title: Great product, great company
items.body: Ordered the 90-day supply and haven't looked back. Focus is sharper, I'm sleeping better, and the customer service when I had a question was brilliant. Highly recommend.
items.reply: Thank you Emma! The 90-day supply is our most popular option for good reason. Really glad the customer service team looked after you too.

items.name: Dan P.
items.title: Exactly what I needed
items.body: Running two businesses and my brain was fried by midweek. Genius Mind has noticeably extended how long I can think clearly each day. The compound effect is real – month 2 was better than month 1.
items.reply: Running two businesses is no joke Dan. The compound effect you're describing is exactly what the clinical research shows with ingredients like Bacopa and Lion's Mane. Keep going!

items.name: Rachel M.
items.title: Impressed with the transparency
items.body: Love that every ingredient and dosage is on the label. No proprietary blends. I can actually see what I'm taking and research it myself. The product itself has been brilliant for my focus and mood.
items.reply: Full transparency is something we feel strongly about Rachel. Every dose is on the label because we believe you should know exactly what you're putting in your body. Thank you!

editorial.headline: Your brain is starving. And willpower won’t feed it.
body: The modern operator's diet is built around speed, not nutrition. Coffee on an empty stomach. Lunch at the desk. Dinner from a wrapper. The micronutrients your brain uses to manufacture dopamine, build neural pathways, and sustain executive function aren't there in the quantities you actually need.
Then we wonder why willpower runs out by Wednesday.
It's not a discipline issue. It's a substrate issue. Your brain is asking for materials it isn't getting.

Genius Mind exists because the highest performers we know – the ones running multiple companies, raising capital, leading teams – don't outperform on character. They outperform on chemistry. They've built better cognitive infrastructure. This is part of how.

items.a: Genius Mind is a cognitive performance supplement containing 16 clinically studied ingredients – including L-Tyrosine (dopamine precursor), Lion's Mane (NGF support), Bacopa Monnieri (synaptic communication), Ginkgo Biloba (cerebral blood flow), Phosphatidylserine, and a full B-vitamin complex. It's designed for sustained cognitive performance across a full working day, not just the first few hours. Each bottle contains 60 vegan capsules (30 servings). Manufactured in a GMP-certified facility in the UK. Vegan, gluten-free, non-GMO.

items.q: Is this designed to treat a medical condition?
items.a: Genius Mind is a food supplement, not a medicine, and is not designed to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any medical condition. It was formulated for high-performing individuals who need their brain to operate consistently across demanding days — founders, operators, anyone carrying significant cognitive load. If you have a diagnosed medical condition or take prescription medication, consult your healthcare provider before starting any new supplement.

items.q: How long until I notice a difference?
items.a: Early clarity improvements typically show within 1–2 weeks as the Guarana and B-vitamin complex begin supporting energy metabolism from day one. The substantive cognitive shift – sustained decision quality, reduced afternoon drop, more consistent output – typically builds over 4–8 weeks as Bacopa Monnieri and Lion's Mane accumulate. We recommend committing to at least 90 days. That's when the compound effect becomes undeniable, and why the 3-month supply is what most serious operators choose.

items.q: Do I have to take it every day?
items.a: Yes. Genius Mind is infrastructure, not a pre-workout. It works cumulatively – the ingredients build in your system over time. Take 2 capsules every morning, ideally 30–60 minutes before your most demanding work. Think of it as part of the stack, not something you reach for only when you're struggling.

items.q: Can I take it with other medication?
items.a: Genius Mind uses naturally derived ingredients and is generally well tolerated. If you're taking prescription medication – particularly antidepressants, blood thinners, or blood pressure medication – consult your GP before starting. Some ingredients, including Ginkgo Biloba, can interact with certain medications. Standard precaution.

items.q: What if it doesn't work for me?
items.a: 90-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. We're confident enough in the formula to take on all the risk ourselves. If you've been consistent for 90 days and haven't noticed a meaningful difference, contact support@justfloow.com and we'll refund you in full.

paragraphs: Disclaimer: This product is a food supplement and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Food supplements should not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. Do not exceed the recommended daily intake. Keep out of reach of children. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking any medications, or under medical supervision, please consult a doctor or healthcare professional before use.

Results may vary between individuals. The testimonials on this page reflect the personal experiences of individual customers and are not intended to represent or guarantee that any user will achieve the same or similar results.
